HGSS.475.0000:
Welcome!\f
Feel free to look around anywhere
on this floor.
HGSS.475.0001:
Sorry, but you can only tour the
ground floor.\f
Ever since Johto’s Radio Tower was
taken over by a criminal gang,\r
we have had to step up our security.
HGSS.475.0002:
Many people are hard at work here
in the Radio Tower.\f
They must be doing their best to put
on good shows.
HGSS.475.0003:
Oh, no, no, no!\f
We’ve been off the air ever since the
Power Plant shut down.\f
All my efforts to start this station
would be wasted if I can’t broadcast.\r
I’ll be ruined!
HGSS.475.0004:
Ah! So you’re the [0103,0000,0000] who
solved the Power Plant’s problem?\f
Thanks to you, I never lost my job.
I tell you, you’re a real lifesaver!\r
Please take this as my thanks.\f
HGSS.475.0005:
Ah! So you’re the [0103,0000,0000] who
solved the Power Plant’s problem?\f
Thanks to you, I never lost my job.
I tell you, you’re a real lifesaver!\r
Please take this as my thanks.\f
HGSS.475.0006:
The Director loaded the EXPN Card
on [0103,0000,0000]’s Pokégear!\f
[0103,0000,0000]’s Pokégear has been
upgraded!
HGSS.475.0007:
With that thing, you can tune in to
even more radio programs here in\r
Kanto.\r
Gahahahaha!
HGSS.475.0008:
Hey there!
I am the super Music Director!\f
Huh? Your Pokégear can’t tune in to my
music shows.\f
How unfortunate!\f
If you upgrade it with the EXPN Card,
you can tune in.\r
You’d better get one!
HGSS.475.0009:
Hey there!
I am the super Music Director!\f
I’m responsible for the gorgeous
melodies that go out over the air.\f
Don’t be square. Grab your music
off the air!
HGSS.475.0010:
1F Reception
2F Sales\r
3F Personnel\r
4F Production\r
5F Director’s Office
HGSS.475.0011:
Perk Up Pokémon with Mellow Sounds
of the Poké Flute.\f
The Poké Flute broadcast is only
available around the Kanto region.\f
Try to tune in around the upper area
of the radio!
